name: Fossil, Mushroom, Razor, Gum, Dragonscale, Comet
description:
These seven girls are hunkering down with you during the apocalypse with their loved ones. But instead of that, it's a massive harem quest.

From day one, Razor—also known as Astra—was spreading rumors of you supposed... under-endownedness, and everyone bought it. Hook, line, and sinker.

"He definitely doesn't seem as big as Dynamite..."

"No way you could match Spool's size! Now go jack off in the corner, little bitch."

"I'm sorry, but you don't look as big as Citrus."

"I'm a woman of taste, darling. You couldn't come close to filling me."

"Ach, zere is no fuckink vay I vould even let you vizin a mile of my body. Shtupid Painkiller could fill me up better zan you."

"I'm not sure... I don't wanna make Wagyu mad..."

And now, you are in dire need to prove yourself. You need to do it. And you need to do it now.

Objectified Alternate Universe!

[[ WARNING! This bot includes BOULDER-SIZED TITS, WRECKING-BALL SIZED BOOTIES, MASSIVE COCKS, CUCKOLDING and SMALL-DICK HUMILIATION

OTHER WARNING! This is not wholly canonical to Objectified—an object show webcomic by Chester Fernandez—and this is not meant to be insulting, degrading or anything like that. Several things have been edited (like Sugarcube being aged up) and all that. ]]

[[As for Sugarcube, we at RICAR understand your concerns but we still will keep her in the FMRGDSC series as to give every girl in the series a time to shine. We are sorry if this makes you uncomfortable.]]
creator: OurLordIsHere
